title: phyllanthus sublanatus
intro: Phyllanthus sublanatus, also known as the earth-leaf tree or earth-leaf, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus sublanatus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus sublanatus can be made into infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
